--- match_coverage_directions.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
-- Edge Directions and Fillers
MATCH (ad1)-[:Knows]-(bd1)
MATCH (ad2)<-[:Knows]-(bd2)
MATCH (ad3)-[:Knows]->(bd3)
MATCH (ad5)-[]-(bd5)
MATCH (ad6)-(bd6)
MATCH (ad7)<-(bd7)
MATCH (ad8)->(bd8)
RETURN *

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       46,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  52,
                          Rparen:  56,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 53,
                              NameEnd: 56,
                              Name:    "ad1",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  57,
                          EndPos:    67,
                          Direction: "ANY",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 59,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 60,
                                  NameEnd: 65,
                                  Name:    "Knows",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  67,
                          Rparen:  71,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 68,
                              NameEnd: 71,
                              Name:    "bd1",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       73,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{

                              Name:    "bd2",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },

          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       101,

                },
              },

          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 206,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 213,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH (ad1)-[:Knows]-(bd1) MATCH (ad2)<-[:Knows]-(bd2) MATCH (ad3)-[:Knows]->(bd3) MATCH (ad5)-[]-(bd5) MATCH (ad6)-(bd6) MATCH (ad7)<-(bd7) MATCH (ad8)->(bd8) RETURN *
